description: D'Arcy & Kiel 2023 Table S4: STRING PPI edges of the expanded protein-protein network (452 nodes / 4668 edges), combined_score > 0.7. Undirected/unsigned association layer, not the mechanistic backbone.
extraction_method: pandas.read_excel(header=2) on 'Table S4 Bioengineering FINAL.xlsx', Sheet1.
